name: Mudanjiang Hengfeng Paper Co.,Ltd
summary: Mudanjiang Hengfeng Paper Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells cigarette-related papers in China and internationally. Its products include cigarette papers, plug wrap papers, aluminum foil backing papers, tipping base papers, Bible papers, and various types of industrial specialty papers. The company was founded in 1952 and is based in Mudanjiang, the People's Republic of China. Mudanjiang Hengfeng Paper Co.,Ltd is a subsidiary of Mudanjiang Hengfeng Paper Industry Group Co., Ltd.
